nurse_heal.say: Nurse Hazel: Welcome!|Shall I heal your Pokemon?
Nurse Hazel: There you go!|They're fighting fit again.

rival_battle.say: Hugh: Hey! Hold up!|You got a Pokemon from the lab too, right?|Let's see what it can do!
Hugh: Hmph. Not bad at all.|Take care of that partner of yours.

then.say: Hugh: I'm off to train.|Next time will be different.
